runtime-control.summary: Target pool for identity, secrets, workflow control, supply-chain, and other high-consequence control-plane anchors. Current VM placement may still be docker-runtime-lv3 until the control migration wave lands.

runtime-general.summary: Target pool for moderate-memory operator, collaboration, observability, and product application surfaces that should leave the legacy shared runtime before control-plane anchors move.

runtime-ai.summary: Target pool for memory-bursty inference, retrieval, OCR, notebook, and model-adjacent workloads. Some services are already live here, while others remain target classifications for later waves.

dedicated-monitoring.summary: Dedicated monitoring plane that remains outside the runtime-pool split for now.

dedicated-edge.summary: Dedicated edge publication plane for shared NGINX-hosted public routes and static portal publication.

dedicated-backup.summary: Dedicated backup plane kept outside the runtime-pool split.

dedicated-build.summary: Dedicated build and artifact-cache plane for repo automation and image builds.

dedicated-coolify.summary: Dedicated Coolify control-plane that remains managed outside the runtime-pool migration waves. coolify_apps has moved to the dedicated-coolify-apps partition.

dedicated-postgres.summary: Dedicated PostgreSQL data plane outside the runtime-pool migration path.

host-management.summary: Host-resident management and observability surfaces that stay on the Proxmox host rather than a runtime pool guest.

dedicated-coolify-apps.summary: Dedicated Coolify apps runtime plane. Hosts all applications deployed through the Coolify deployment server on coolify-apps-lv3, isolated from the control-plane VM.
